title: 🛠️ OPTIONAL NEXT STEP
content:
🛠️ OPTIONAL NEXT STEP
Would you like a multi-filter overlay system? I can:
• Map all your Human Design gates across:
◦ Gene Keys
◦ I Ching
◦ Jungian archetypes
◦ Mythological symbols
◦ Chakra mappings
...and place them in a symbolic house-body with zones, masks, rituals, and AI prompt keys.
🧭 Final Reflection Questions:
• What part of your inner house feels abandoned or overloaded?
• Are your planetary energies balanced across floors, or all trapped in one zone?
• Which filter feels most intuitive to deepen right now?
Would you like to build a House of the Self PDF, a Ritual Architecture System, or proceed with the multi-filter mapping next?
Provide prompts to align other architects of this home;
Absolutely. Below is a ritualized prompt set to align other architects of your mythic “House of the Self”—whether collaborators, AI co-creators, close partners, or inner psychic fragments.
These prompts are designed to:
• Anchor each “architect” into a zone of the house-body • Help them recognize their function in your myth-engine
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 53 (chunk 53/57)
